name: tophub-trends
description: 获取并分析 TopHub 热榜数据，提供内容创作灵感。
capabilities: Fetch real-time hot list data from TopHub
Extract top 30 trending topics with metadata
Analyze traffic potential using Claude AI
Generate content angle suggestions with explanations
Save raw data as JSON and analysis as Markdown report
author: wangdefou-dev
securitySummary: All 74 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The scanner misidentified JavaScript template literals as shell backticks, Cheerio jQuery-style iteration as shell command substitution, and legitimate path resolution as path traversal. This skill performs a single documented network fetch to tophub.today, loads configuration from a local .env file, and writes output to a defined directory. No command execution, no credential exfiltration, no data theft patterns found.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to find trending topics that resonate with audiences. This skill fetches real-time hot list data from TopHub and uses Claude to identify high-potential topics and generate content suggestions.
userTitle: Analyze TopHub Trends for Content Ideas
limitations: Only analyzes Chinese-language content from TopHub
Limited to 30 topics per analysis run
Requires Anthropic API key for AI analysis
No filtering by specific categories or timeframes

useCases.title: Daily Topic Research
useCases.description: Quickly identify trending topics for daily social media content planning.

useCases.title: SEO Content选题
useCases.description: Find high-traffic topics to create SEO-optimized blog posts.

useCases.title: Trend Reports
useCases.description: Generate regular trend reports for client content strategies.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Trend Check
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the TopHub Trends skill to fetch current hot topics.

promptTemplates.title: Specific Analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Run TopHub Trends and focus on which topics have the highest viral potential right now.

promptTemplates.title: Content Angles
promptTemplates.prompt: Run TopHub Trends and suggest 5 specific content angles I could use for my audience.

promptTemplates.title: Weekly Report
promptTemplates.prompt: Run TopHub Trends multiple times this week and create a summary report of emerging topics.

bestPractices: Run daily to catch emerging trends before they peak
Combine with your audience research for targeted content
Use the analysis timestamp to track trend duration
antiPatterns: Do not use for spreading misinformation or clickbait
Avoid copying titles verbatim - add original angle
Do not rely solely on trends without fact-checking

faq.question: What is TopHub?
faq.answer: TopHub aggregates hot topics from multiple Chinese platforms like Zhihu, Weibo, and Douban.

faq.question: Do I need an API key?
faq.answer: Yes, an Anthropic API key is required for the AI analysis feature.

faq.question: Can I test without API key?
faq.answer: Set MOCK_MODE=true in .env to use simulated data for testing.

faq.question: Where are results saved?
faq.answer: Reports are saved to outputs/trends/ directory as timestamped JSON and Markdown files.

faq.question: How many topics analyzed?
faq.answer: The skill fetches all available topics but analyzes the top 30 for content suggestions.

faq.question: How often should I run it?
faq.answer: Running daily is recommended to catch trends at optimal engagement timing.
